locationPointsHelp: Used to calculate distances to FindMy devices. Index = state ID, Name = label of the state.
findMyIntervalHelp: How often FindMy devices are polled (1–120 minutes)
calendarEventCountHelp: Number of future events to fetch per calendar (1–50)
calendarIntervalHelp: How often calendar events are fetched (5–1440 minutes)
remindersItemCountHelp: Number of open reminders to fetch per list (1–50)
remindersIntervalHelp: How often reminders are fetched (5–1440 minutes)
accountStorageIntervalHelp: How often storage usage is fetched (30–1440 minutes)
remindersFilterHelp: Due/started: only reminders whose start or due date is in the past. All: all open reminders.
remindersShowCompletedHelp: Show completed reminders in a separate 'completed' subfolder per list.
remindersResyncHelp: Clears the sync token and re-fetches all reminders from iCloud.
contactsIntervalHelp: How often contacts are fetched (30–1440 minutes)
contactsWriteStatesHelp: Additionally writes contacts as ioBroker states (folder per contact). Always available via sendTo.
notesIntervalHelp: How often notes are fetched (15–1440 minutes)
geocodingProviderHelp: Choose how device positions are resolved to addresses. Only one provider can be active at a time.
geocodingLocalInfo: Uses a local GeoJSON index of German municipalities (~74 MB, loaded once at startup). Only returns municipality names, no street addresses. Works offline, no external server required.
geocodingUrlHelp: Full URL of the geocoding server (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:3000 for Traccar, https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org for Nominatim, https://api.opencagedata.com for OpenCage)
geocodingApiKeyHelp: API key for the geocoding service. Required for OpenCage. Optional for Traccar (depends on server config). Not needed for Nominatim.
geocodingCacheSizeHelp: Addresses are cached in a 3 m grid. The adapter enforces a 1 request/second throttle between external requests.
geocodingInfoTraccar:
Self-hosted server — no external rate limit. Street names are returned in the ioBroker system language (where supported by the server).
Setup guide: https://www.traccar.org/geocoder/
API key: depends on your server configuration — see the guide above.
geocodingInfoNominatim:
No API key required for the public server (https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org). Street names are returned in the ioBroker system language.
Usage policy (max 1 req/s, fair use, no bulk requests): https://operations.osmfoundation.org/policies/nominatim/
For heavy use, run your own instance: https://nominatim.org/release-docs/latest/admin/Installation/
geocodingInfoOpencage:
API key required. Street names are returned in the ioBroker system language.
Free tier: 2 500 requests/day (no credit card required).
Get your API key: https://opencagedata.com/users/sign_up
Pricing & limits: https://opencagedata.com/pricing
API documentation: https://opencagedata.com/api
photosIntervalHelp: How often photo metadata is fetched (15–1440 minutes)
driveSyncInfo: Synchronize local directories to iCloud Drive. Supports BackItUp integration and custom directories with conflict resolution.
driveSyncIntervalHelp: How often files are synced to iCloud Drive (5–1440 minutes)
